params.prompt: Extreme close-up detail shot with smooth tracking camera following harsh directional light as it grows and spreads across textured surface. Neutral white balance, balanced exposure — deep dramatic shadows without underexposure. Shallow depth of field. Static slow zoom on bed-and-crib grouping, camera holds composition while gently tightening crop on crib and bedside, soft daylight from window shifts across textiles, consistent exposure, cinematic, photorealistic Dream, Calm, meditative warmth — family-ready Japandi with breathable layouts and tactile materials. Maintain believable residential scale for a 12.5 by 11.583333333333334 ft Dream. Plausible light drift from visible sources only, consistent exposure, straight architecture, stable walls and windows, premium real-estate cinematography.
